description: Subagent orchestration discipline: delegation contracts (self-contained prompts, compressed evidence-backed returns, model/effort tiering, scout-then-fanout, writer isolation) and verification panels (refuter voting, judge panels, loop-until-dry, completeness critic). Includes /orchestration:review.
